title: Authorization: QSMS Role Access
description: Verify that QSMS role can access Overall, Add Case, and Dashboard tabs.

steps.description: Verify 'ภาพรวม (Overall)' tab is visible
Verify 'เพิ่มงานใหม่ (Add Case)' tab is visible
Verify 'แดชบอร์ด (Dashboard)' tab is visible

title: Authorization: WFG Role Access
description: Verify that WFG role can access Overall and Add Case tabs, but NOT Dashboard.

steps.description: Verify 'ภาพรวม (Overall)' tab is visible
Verify 'เพิ่มงานใหม่ (Add Case)' tab is visible
Verify 'แดชบอร์ด (Dashboard)' tab is NOT visible

title: Authorization: Finance Role Access
description: Verify that Finance role can access Overall tab only.

steps.description: Verify 'ภาพรวม (Overall)' tab is visible
Verify 'เพิ่มงานใหม่ (Add Case)' tab is NOT visible
Verify 'แดชบอร์ด (Dashboard)' tab is NOT visible
